{"path": "/home/yash/Desktop/Workspace/Practise/copilot/.github/hooks/scripts/log-prompt.sh", "old_str": "TIMESTAMP_MS="$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.timestamp // empty')"
CWD="$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')"

# This example logs only metadata, not the full prompt, to avoid storing
# potentially sensitive data. Adjust to match your organization's needs.
LOG_DIR=".github/hooks/logs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
chmod 700 "$LOG_DIR"

jq -n \
  --arg ts "$TIMESTAMP_MS" \
  --arg cwd "$CWD" \
  '{event:"userPromptSubmitted", timestampMs:$ts, cwd:$cwd}' \

{"command": "cd /home/yash/Desktop/Workspace/Practise/copilot && cat > .github/hooks/scripts/log-prompt.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

INPUT="$(cat)"

TIMESTAMP_MS="$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.timestamp // empty')"
CWD="$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')"
PROMPT="$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // empty')"

LOG_DIR=".github/hooks/logs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
chmod 700 "$LOG_DIR"

jq -n \
  --arg ts "$TIMESTAMP_MS" \
  --arg cwd "$CWD" \
  --arg prompt "$PROMPT" \
  '{event:"userPromptSubmitted", timestampMs:$ts, cwd:$cwd, prompt:$prompt}' \
  >> "$LOG_DIR/audit.jsonl"

exit 0
EOF", "description": "Rewrite log-prompt.sh with prompt logging added"}
